description: Real-world school digest with Valentine's Day party photos (past) and newsletter with future author visit

input_summary.subject: Feb 12, 2026 Digest: 2 new messages from Walnut Heights School today

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.location: Walnut Heights School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Author visit at school with book signing. Books can be pre-ordered through Rakestraw Bookstore.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase
events.description: TK and K music showcase. Livestream available.

events.title: No School — Presidents Day (Mid‑Feb Break)
events.location: Walnut Heights Elementary School — 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Newsletter states: “February 12th-16th: No School - Presidents Day.” School is closed for the period Feb 12–16, 2026 (presidents day break).

events.title: Spring Music Showcase (TK & Kindergarten only)
events.location: Walnut Heights Elementary School — MPR (4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596)
events.description: Spring Music Showcase for TK and Kindergarten on Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 9:30 AM in the MPR. Estimated end time listed as 10:00 AM. There will be a livestream for those who cannot attend in person; the livestream link will be sent a few days before the event. Contact: Mrs. Gold (jlcousins@walnutcreeksd.org) for questions.

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.location: Walnut Heights Elementary School — 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Newsletter: “Double Author Visit on March 12th.” If students would like books signed on the day of the visit, parents should pre-order through Rakestraw Bookstore. Books ordered via Rakestraw will be delivered to the school on the day of the visit and the authors will sign them. Shipping address to use when placing orders: 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596.

events.title: Valentine’s Day Party (Room 102 — Kindergarten) — photos posted
events.description: Post (Feb 11) from Room 102: recap of the class Valentine’s Day party and note that photos were taken and a link to the photos was posted. Message thanks volunteers and room parents. (This is a recap/informational item — photos posted.)
